description: Modulo de ordens de compra para itens sem estoque. OC por fornecedor atendendo N pedidos de venda. Fluxo: aprovacao OC → comprador cria OC por fornecedor → recebimento/conferencia → entrada estoque Tiny tipo E → liberacao automatica de pedidos para separacao.

userStories.title: Types — Compras module types
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all compras-related types defined in types/index.ts so that subsequent stories have full type safety.
acceptanceCriteria: Add OrdemCompra type with fields: id (string), fornecedor (string), empresa_id (string), status ('aguardando_compra' | 'comprado' | 'parcialmente_recebido' | 'recebido' | 'cancelado'), observacao (string | null), comprado_por (string | null), comprado_em (string | null), created_at (string)
Add CompraStatus type: 'aguardando_compra' | 'comprado' | 'recebido' | 'indisponivel' | null

Update PedidoItem type adding: produto_id_tiny (number | null), fornecedor_oc (string | null), ordem_compra_id (string | null), compra_status (CompraStatus), compra_quantidade_recebida (number), comprado_em (string | null), comprado_por (string | null), recebido_em (string | null), recebido_por (string | null)

Add CompraItemAgrupado type with fields: sku (string), descricao (string), imagem (string | null), quantidade_total (number), fornecedor_oc (string), pedidos (array of {pedido_id: string, numero_pedido: string, quantidade: number}), itens_ids (string[])

Add ConferenciaItem type with fields: item_id (string), sku (string), descricao (string), imagem (string | null), quantidade_esperada (number), quantidade_ja_recebida (number), quantidade_restante (number), produto_id_tiny (number | null), pedidos (array of {pedido_id: string, numero_pedido: string, quantidade: number})
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Schema — Migration for siso_ordens_compra and siso_pedido_itens compra columns
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the database schema updated with the ordens_compra table and compra tracking columns so that the compras module has persistence.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration file supabase/migrations/20260311_modulo_compras.sql

CREATE TABLE siso_ordens_compra with columns: id (uuid PK default gen_random_uuid()), fornecedor (text NOT NULL), empresa_id (uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES siso_empresas(id)), status (text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'comprado' CHECK IN ('aguardando_compra','comprado','parcialmente_recebido','recebido','cancelado')), observacao (text), comprado_por (uuid REFERENCES siso_usuarios(id)), comprado_em (timestamptz), created_at (timestamptz DEFAULT now())

ALTER TABLE siso_pedido_itens ADD COLUMNS: produto_id_tiny (bigint), fornecedor_oc (text), ordem_compra_id (uuid REFERENCES siso_ordens_compra(id)), compra_status (text), compra_quantidade_recebida (int DEFAULT 0), comprado_em (timestamptz), comprado_por (uuid), recebido_em (timestamptz), recebido_por (uuid)
CREATE INDEX idx_pedido_itens_compra_status ON siso_pedido_itens(compra_status) WHERE compra_status IS NOT NULL
CREATE INDEX idx_pedido_itens_fornecedor_oc ON siso_pedido_itens(fornecedor_oc) WHERE fornecedor_oc IS NOT NULL
CREATE INDEX idx_pedido_itens_ordem_compra_id ON siso_pedido_itens(ordem_compra_id) WHERE ordem_compra_id IS NOT NULL
CREATE INDEX idx_ordens_compra_status ON siso_ordens_compra(status)
CREATE INDEX idx_ordens_compra_fornecedor ON siso_ordens_compra(fornecedor)
Apply migration via Supabase MCP tool apply_migration
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Backend — Save produto_id_tiny during webhook enrichment
userStories.description: As a developer, I want produto_id_tiny saved in siso_pedido_itens during webhook processing so that the conferencia can use it directly without additional Tiny API calls.
acceptanceCriteria: In webhook-processor.ts, when stock is queried for each item via Tiny API, extract the produto ID from the response
Save produto_id_tiny in the siso_pedido_itens upsert alongside existing stock data
Also save fornecedor_oc using the existing sku-fornecedor.ts mapping (getFornecedorBySku function)
If SKU is not found in Tiny (no stock response), produto_id_tiny remains null
Log a warning when produto_id_tiny could not be resolved for an item
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Check how webhook-processor.ts currently saves items to siso_pedido_itens. The produto ID comes from the Tiny stock/product API response. Also check sku-fornecedor.ts for the SKU-to-supplier mapping function.

userStories.title: Backend — Worker sets compra fields after OC approval
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the execution worker to set compra fields on pedido items when a pedido is approved as OC, so that items appear in the compras module.
acceptanceCriteria: In execution-worker.ts, after executarMarcadoresOnly completes (OC flow), update siso_pedidos set status_separacao = 'aguardando_compra'
Update all siso_pedido_itens of that pedido set compra_status = 'aguardando_compra'
The main pedido status field continues going to 'concluido' as before (no change there)
Log the transition: logger.info('execution-worker', 'Pedido OC enviado para modulo de compras', { pedidoId })
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Check execution-worker.ts for the OC/marcadores flow. The worker already has an executarMarcadoresOnly function. Add the compra field updates after it succeeds.

userStories.title: Backend — GET /api/compras endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a GET endpoint that returns compra items grouped by supplier and status so that the frontend can render the compras page.
acceptanceCriteria: Create file src/app/api/compras/route.ts with GET handler
Accept query param 'status' to filter: 'aguardando_compra', 'comprado', 'indisponivel' (default: 'aguardando_compra')
For status='aguardando_compra': query siso_pedido_itens WHERE compra_status='aguardando_compra' AND ordem_compra_id IS NULL, join with siso_pedidos for pedido info, group by fornecedor_oc
For status='comprado': query siso_ordens_compra WHERE status IN ('comprado','parcialmente_recebido'), include their items from siso_pedido_itens
For status='indisponivel': query siso_pedido_itens WHERE compra_status='indisponivel'
Return counts per status for tab badges: {aguardando_compra: N, comprado: N, indisponivel: N}
For aguardando_compra: consolidate items with same SKU + fornecedor (sum quantities, collect pedido references)
Auth check: only allow cargo 'admin' or 'comprador'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use createServiceClient() from supabase-server.ts. Auth is via localStorage session — read the pattern from existing API routes like pedidos/aprovar/route.ts. Items need pedido info (numero_pedido) from siso_pedidos join.

userStories.title: Backend — POST /api/compras/ordens endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a POST endpoint that creates an ordem de compra and links aguardando items to it, so that the buyer can track purchases.
acceptanceCriteria: Create file src/app/api/compras/ordens/route.ts with POST handler
Accept body: { fornecedor: string, empresa_id: string, observacao?: string, usuario_id: string }
Insert new record in siso_ordens_compra with status='comprado', comprado_em=now(), comprado_por=usuario_id

Update all siso_pedido_itens WHERE fornecedor_oc = fornecedor AND compra_status = 'aguardando_compra' AND ordem_compra_id IS NULL: set ordem_compra_id, compra_status='comprado', comprado_em=now(), comprado_por=usuario_id
Return the created OC with count of linked items
If no items found for that fornecedor, return 400 error
Auth check: only allow cargo 'admin' or 'comprador'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: empresa_id comes from the frontend — the buyer selects which empresa will receive the goods. Use createServiceClient().

userStories.title: Backend — GET /api/compras/conferencia/[ordemCompraId] endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a GET endpoint that returns OC items for the receiving/checking screen so the operator can see what to expect.
acceptanceCriteria: Create file src/app/api/compras/conferencia/[ordemCompraId]/route.ts with GET handler
Query siso_ordens_compra by ordemCompraId, return 404 if not found
Query siso_pedido_itens WHERE ordem_compra_id = ordemCompraId AND compra_status = 'comprado'
For each item calculate: quantidade_restante = quantidade (from pedido) - compra_quantidade_recebida
Join with siso_pedidos for pedido numero_pedido reference
Return OC info + array of ConferenciaItem (sku, descricao, imagem, quantidade_esperada, quantidade_ja_recebida, quantidade_restante, produto_id_tiny, pedidos)
Auth check: only allow cargo 'admin' or 'comprador'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: quantidade_esperada is the original quantity from the pedido item. quantidade_restante = quantidade_esperada - compra_quantidade_recebida. Items with compra_status='recebido' should NOT appear (they're fully received).

userStories.title: Backend — POST /api/compras/conferir endpoint (receiving + Tiny stock entry)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a POST endpoint that processes the receiving confirmation: updates quantities in DB and calls Tiny movimentarEstoque type E for each item.
acceptanceCriteria: Create file src/app/api/compras/conferir/route.ts with POST handler
Accept body: { ordem_compra_id: string, usuario_id: string, itens: Array<{ item_id: string, quantidade_recebida: number }> }
For each item with quantidade_recebida > 0 AND produto_id_tiny is not null: call movimentarEstoque in Tiny with tipo='E', using produto_id_tiny and deposito_id from siso_tiny_connections
Use waitForRateLimit + registerApiCall from rate-limiter.ts before each Tiny call
Add 500ms sleep between Tiny API calls to avoid overload
If Tiny call fails for an item, log the error and continue with remaining items (do not abort)
Update siso_pedido_itens: compra_quantidade_recebida += quantidade_recebida for each item
If compra_quantidade_recebida >= quantity from pedido: set compra_status='recebido', recebido_em=now(), recebido_por=usuario_id
If produto_id_tiny is null for an item, skip Tiny call, log warning 'SKU nao encontrado no Tiny', still update quantity in DB
Update siso_ordens_compra status: if all items 'recebido' then 'recebido', if mix then 'parcialmente_recebido'
Return summary: { processados: N, erros: N, erros_detalhe: [...], itens_sem_produto_id: N }
Auth check: only allow cargo 'admin' or 'comprador'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use tiny-api.ts movimentarEstoque function. Get deposito_id by querying siso_tiny_connections WHERE empresa_id = OC's empresa_id. Use the observacao 'Entrada OC via SISO'. Check rate-limiter.ts for waitForRateLimit pattern used in execution-worker.ts.

userStories.title: Backend — Release logic after receiving
userStories.description: As a developer, I want pedidos de venda automatically released for picking when all their items are received across all OCs, so no manual intervention is needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib function checkAndReleasePedidos(itemIds: string[]) in a new file src/lib/compras-release.ts
From the received item IDs, get distinct pedido_ids from siso_pedido_itens
For each pedido: query ALL its items (not just OC items) — check if every item with compra_status has compra_status='recebido'
If ALL compra items of a pedido are 'recebido': release the pedido
Release means: update siso_pedidos set decisao_final='propria', status='executando', status_separacao='aguardando_nf'
Insert job in siso_fila_execucao with tipo='lancar_estoque', decisao='propria', pedido_id, empresa_id
Log: logger.info('compras-release', 'Pedido liberado apos recebimento OC', { pedidoId })
Return array of released pedido IDs
Call this function at the end of POST /api/compras/conferir after DB updates
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Check execution-worker.ts and siso_fila_execucao table structure for the correct job format. The worker will pick up the job and run executarSaidaPropria (existing flow). Important: only check items that have compra_status set (non-null) — normal items without compra flow should not block release.

userStories.title: Backend — Item action APIs (devolver, indisponivel, trocar-fornecedor)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want API endpoints for the buyer to handle unavailable items: return to queue, mark unavailable, or change supplier.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/compras/itens/[itemId]/devolver/route.ts with POST handler: set compra_status='aguardando_compra', ordem_compra_id=null. If OC has no more items after this, set OC status='cancelado'
Create src/app/api/compras/itens/[itemId]/indisponivel/route.ts with POST handler: set compra_status='indisponivel'. Log warning with pedido info.

Create src/app/api/compras/itens/[itemId]/trocar-fornecedor/route.ts with POST handler: accept { novo_fornecedor: string, nova_ordem_compra_id?: string }. Update fornecedor_oc, move to new OC if provided or remove from current OC (set ordem_compra_id=null, compra_status='aguardando_compra')
All three endpoints: auth check for cargo 'admin' or 'comprador'
All three endpoints: return updated item
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: When removing an item from an OC, check if OC still has items. If empty, set OC status to 'cancelado'. Use createServiceClient().

userStories.title: Backend — Webhook cancellation handler for compras
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the cancellation webhook to detect and clean up compras items so that cancelled orders don't waste purchasing effort.
acceptanceCriteria: In webhook-processor.ts (or the cancellation handler), when a pedido is cancelled, check if status_separacao is 'aguardando_compra' or 'comprado'
If yes: set compra_status=null and ordem_compra_id=null for all items of that pedido
Set status_separacao='cancelado' on the pedido
For each affected OC: recheck if OC still has items, if empty set OC status='cancelado'
If any item had compra_quantidade_recebida > 0 (stock already entered in Tiny): log a warning with level 'warn' including SKU and quantity that was already entered
Store a flag or field on the pedido indicating 'compra_estoque_lancado_alerta' = true when stock was already entered, so the UI can show a visible alert
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Check how the existing webhook cancellation flow works in webhook-processor.ts or the webhook route. The stock that was already entered in Tiny stays — no reversal. The alert is just informational.

userStories.title: Frontend — /compras page layout with tabs and data fetching
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the /compras page skeleton with tabs and React Query data fetching so that the compras module has a home.
acceptanceCriteria: Create file src/app/compras/page.tsx as a 'use client' page
Add page to navigation (if there's a nav component, add 'Compras' link)
Use the existing Tabs component (src/components/ui/tabs.tsx) with 3 tabs: 'Aguardando Compra', 'Comprado', 'Indisponiveis'
Each tab shows a counter badge from the API response counts
Use React Query (useQuery) to fetch GET /api/compras with the active tab's status as query param
Refetch every 30 seconds (refetchInterval: 30000) — but NOT on the conferencia page
Show LoadingSpinner while loading, EmptyState when no items
Auth guard: redirect to /login if no user in localStorage, show 'Acesso negado' if cargo is not admin/comprador
Follow existing page patterns (zinc palette, max-w-3xl on mobile, Outfit font)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Follow the same pattern as src/app/page.tsx (dashboard) for page structure, auth check, and React Query usage. Use the existing tabs component from src/components/ui/tabs.tsx.

userStories.title: Frontend — Aguardando Compra tab with supplier cards
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Aguardando Compra tab to show items grouped by supplier with consolidation and a 'Marcar como Comprado' button.
acceptanceCriteria: Create component src/components/compras/fornecedor-card.tsx for the supplier card
Card shows: fornecedor name as header, list of SKUs with descricao + quantidade (consolidated across pedidos), pedido numbers as small badges
Items with same SKU from different pedidos show summed quantity with breakdown on hover/expand
'Copiar SKUs' button copies tab-separated text (SKU, descricao, quantidade) to clipboard via navigator.clipboard.writeText, show toast.success on copy
'Marcar como Comprado' button opens a small form: textarea for observacao (optional), confirm button
On confirm: POST /api/compras/ordens with fornecedor + empresa_id + observacao + usuario_id, invalidate React Query cache, show toast.success
Use Lucide icons: Package for supplier, Copy for copy button, ShoppingCart for comprar
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: empresa_id: for now use the empresa_id from the first item's pedido (empresa_origem_id from siso_pedidos). The consolidation groups items by SKU within a supplier — same SKU from pedido #100 (2un) and #101 (1un) shows as '3un' with breakdown.

userStories.title: Frontend — Comprado tab with OC cards
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Comprado tab to show individual OC cards with their items and a 'Conferir Recebimento' button.
acceptanceCriteria: Create component src/components/compras/ordem-compra-card.tsx
Card shows: 'OC #N — {fornecedor}' as header, observacao text, 'Comprado por {nome} em {data}', 'Ha X dias' relative time
List of items in the OC: SKU, descricao, quantidade, status badge (comprado/parcialmente recebido/recebido)
If OC status is 'parcialmente_recebido', show progress indicator (X de Y itens recebidos)
'Conferir Recebimento' button navigates to /compras/conferencia/[ordemCompraId]
Multiple OCs from the same fornecedor appear as separate cards
Use Lucide icons: Truck for delivery, ClipboardCheck for conferir
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The API returns OCs with their items for status='comprado'. Use Next.js router.push for navigation to conferencia page.

userStories.title: Frontend — Conferencia page (receiving form)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the conferencia page where the operator enters received quantities and confirms, triggering Tiny stock entry.
acceptanceCriteria: Create file src/app/compras/conferencia/[ordemCompraId]/page.tsx as 'use client' page
Fetch OC data via GET /api/compras/conferencia/[ordemCompraId] using React Query
Show OC info header: fornecedor, observacao, data da compra
For each item: show SKU, descricao, imagem (if available), quantidade_restante as 'Esperado', number input for 'Recebido' pre-filled with quantidade_restante
Show pedido numbers linked to each item as small badges
Number input: min=0, no max (allows > expected), step=1, integer only
Do NOT auto-refresh this page (no refetchInterval) to avoid losing typed values
'Confirmar Recebimento' button: disabled when all quantities are 0, shows loading state during POST
On confirm: POST /api/compras/conferir, show results toast with processados/erros counts and released pedidos
After successful confirm: navigate back to /compras
If there were errors: show error details (which items failed) before navigating
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use controlled inputs with useState for quantities. The confirm POST may take a while (multiple Tiny API calls with sleeps) so show a good loading state. Use Sonner toast for feedback.

userStories.title: Frontend — Item actions and Indisponiveis tab
userStories.description: As a developer, I want item-level actions (devolver, indisponivel, trocar fornecedor) in OC cards and an Indisponiveis tab for visibility.
acceptanceCriteria: In ordem-compra-card.tsx: add a dropdown menu (or action buttons) per item with 3 options: 'Devolver pra fila', 'Marcar indisponivel', 'Trocar fornecedor'
'Devolver pra fila': POST /api/compras/itens/[itemId]/devolver, invalidate cache, toast.success('Item devolvido para fila de compras')
'Marcar indisponivel': confirm dialog, POST /api/compras/itens/[itemId]/indisponivel, invalidate cache, toast.success
'Trocar fornecedor': small modal/form with text input for new fornecedor name, POST /api/compras/itens/[itemId]/trocar-fornecedor with { novo_fornecedor }, invalidate cache
Indisponiveis tab: simple list of items with compra_status='indisponivel', showing SKU, descricao, fornecedor original, pedido number, and a badge 'Indisponivel'
Use Lucide icons: RotateCcw for devolver, XCircle for indisponivel, ArrowRightLeft for trocar
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The trocar-fornecedor action on the backend sets ordem_compra_id=null and compra_status='aguardando_compra' with the new fornecedor. The item will appear in Aguardando Compra under the new supplier name.
